H

hasEqualMinMax() - Method in class microui.util.BoundedValue
Checks if the minimum and maximum values are equal.

Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class microui.util.SpatialState
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hasId() - Method in class microui.core.base.View
Checks if this View has a non-default numeric identifier.
hasMargin() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Checks if any margin is applied (non-zero values).
hasPadding() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Checks if any padding is applied (non-zero values).
hasSelection() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Checks if any text is currently selected.
hasTextId() - Method in class microui.core.base.View
Checks if this View has a non-default text identifier.
hasWeight() - Method in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Checks if any shadow weight is non-zero.
hasWeightBottom() - Method in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Checks if bottom shadow weight is non-zero.
hasWeightLeft() - Method in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Checks if left shadow weight is non-zero.
hasWeightRight() - Method in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Checks if right shadow weight is non-zero.
hasWeightTop() - Method in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Checks if top shadow weight is non-zero.
height() - Method in record class microui.util.SpatialState
Returns the value of the height record component.
HORIZONTAL - Enum constant in enum class microui.constants.Orientation
Horizontal orientation - components are arranged or operate in a left-to-right manner.
Hover - Class in microui.core.effect
Visual hover effect for Component elements with smooth fade-in/fade-out animation.
Hover(Component) - Constructor for class microui.core.effect.Hover
Constructs a Hover effect for the specified component.
HOVER - Enum constant in enum class microui.event.EventType
Hover state (LEVEL).
